allow: Bash(echo "=== flake.nix 280-345 ===" && sed -n '280,345p' flake.nix && echo "=== machines/abhaile ===" && ls machines/abhaile/ && echo "=== nested virt? ===" && grep -rn "nested\\|kvm" /etc/modprobe.d/ 2>/dev/null | head; echo "=== short config head ===" && sed -n '1,40p' machines/short/configuration.nix 2>/dev/null)
